mapper.sql: id, real_name, dm_num, entry_date, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delflag
mapper.select:
select dm.id, dm.real_name as realName, dm.dm_num as dmNum, dm.entry_date as entryDate, group_concat(ifnull(r.room_num, '') order by r.room_num, r.create_time) as building from user_dormitory_manager dm left join building_dm bd on bd.dm_id = dm.id and bd.is_current = 1 left join dm_room r on r.id = bd.building_id and r.delflag = 0 and r.parent_id = '${@cloud.ciky.base.constant.SystemConstants@ROOT_NODE_ID}' where dm.delflag = 0
and (dm.real_name like concat('%', #{query.keywords}, '%') or dm.dm_num like concat('%', #{query.keywords}, '%'))
group by dm.id order by dm.create_time desc

select dm.id as dm_id, dm.real_name as dm_real_name, dm.dm_num, dm.entry_date, u.id as user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.real_name as user_real_name, u.user_type, u.phone, u.email from dm_business.user_dormitory_manager dm left join dm_system.sys_user u on u.business_user_id = dm.id and u.delflag = 0 and u.user_type = ${@cloud.ciky.system.enums.UserTypeEnum@DORMITORY_MANAGER.getValue()} where dm.id = #{id} and dm.delflag = 0
